ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "fixture" INTEGER /* Identifier for the fixture */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the match */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "team_h_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "team_h_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Match round identifier */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "transfers_balance" INTEGER /* Transfers balance of the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Team's social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transfer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the transfer */,
  "transfers_in" INTEGER /* Number of incoming transfers for the player */,
  "transfers_out" INTEGER /* Number of outgoing transfers for the player */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the transfer */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer */,
  "transfer_from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred from */,
  "transfer_to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred to */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the new contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the new contract */,
  "contract_options" TEXT /* Additional contract options */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_transfer_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_transfer_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the metrics */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Total saves made by the player (for goalkeepers) */,
  "goals_conceded_total" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the player across all matches */,
  "goals_scored_total" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player across all matches */,
  "assists_total" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player across all matches */,
  "clean_sheets_total" INTEGER /* Total clean sheets kept by the player across all matches */,
  "minutes_played_total" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player across all matches */,
  "yellow_cards_total" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player across all matches */,
  "red_cards_total" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player across all matches */,
  "saves_total" INTEGER /* Total saves made by the player (for goalkeepers) across all matches */,
  "bps_total" INTEGER /* Total bonus points system score across all matches */,
  "creativity_total" REAL /* Total creativity score across all matches */,
  "influence_total" REAL /* Total influence score across all matches */,
  "threat_total" REAL /* Total threat index score across all matches */,
  "ict_index_total" REAL /* Total ICT index score across all matches */,
  "total_points_total" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player across all matches */,
  "penalties_missed_total" INTEGER /* Total penalties missed by the player across all matches */,
  "penalties_saved_total" INTEGER /* Total penalties saved by the player (for goalkeepers) across all matches */,
  "own_goals_total" INTEGER /* Total own goals scored by the player across all matches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
